ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hse_areas" (
  "hse_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HSE area */,
  "hse_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the HSE area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HSE area */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact for the HSE area */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact for the HSE area */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact for the HSE area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the HSE area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the HSE area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hse_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "hse_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HSE area the statistic belongs to */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type the statistic belongs to */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the statistic was recorded */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the statistic belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (e.g., incident report, survey, inspection) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_hse_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("hse_area_id") REFERENCES hse_areas ("hse_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "hse_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HSE area the incident report belongs to */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type the incident report belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the incident report belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident report */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the incident report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the incident report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_hse_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("hse_area_id") REFERENCES hse_areas ("hse_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "hse_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HSE area the survey belongs to */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type the survey belongs to */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the survey */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the survey belongs to */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey */,
  "number_of_responses" INTEGER /* Number of responses received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was conducted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_hse_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("hse_area_id") REFERENCES hse_areas ("hse_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "hse_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HSE area the inspection belongs to */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type the inspection belongs to */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Findings of the inspection */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the inspection belongs to */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of the inspection */,
  "findings_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inspection was conducted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_hse_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("hse_area_id") REFERENCES hse_areas ("hse_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inspector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)
